title: Scrapfly Scrape Request Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for Scrapfly scrape API request parameters

fields.name: key
fields.description: API key from the Scrapfly dashboard

fields.name: url
fields.description: Target URL to scrape (must be URL-encoded)

fields.name: render_js
fields.description: Enable headless browser rendering for JavaScript-heavy pages

fields.name: asp
fields.description: Enable Anti Scraping Protection bypass (increases credit cost)

fields.name: country
fields.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for proxy location

fields.name: proxy_pool
fields.description: Proxy network: public_datacenter_pool or residential_pool

fields.name: format
fields.description: Response format: raw, clean_html, json, markdown, or text

fields.name: lang
fields.description: Preferred language via Accept-Language header (e.g., en-US)

fields.name: headers
fields.description: Custom HTTP headers as key-value pairs

fields.name: timeout
fields.description: Request timeout in milliseconds

fields.name: retry
fields.description: Automatically retry failed requests

fields.name: rendering_wait
fields.description: Milliseconds to wait after page load before capturing (requires render_js)

fields.name: wait_for_selector
fields.description: CSS/XPath selector to wait for before capturing content

fields.name: js
fields.description: Base64-encoded custom JavaScript to execute on the page (max 16KB)

fields.name: screenshots
fields.description: CSS selectors for element screenshots, or 'main' for viewport

fields.name: js_scenario
fields.description: URL-encoded JSON scenario for page interactions (click, scroll, etc.)

fields.name: cache
fields.description: Cache the scrape response to avoid redundant requests

fields.name: cache_ttl
fields.description: Cache time-to-live in seconds

fields.name: cache_clear
fields.description: Force cache refresh for the URL

fields.name: session
fields.description: Named session for cookie/fingerprint persistence across requests

fields.name: session_sticky_proxy
fields.description: Reuse the same proxy IP within the session

fields.name: extraction_template
fields.description: Predefined extraction template name for structured data

fields.name: extraction_prompt
fields.description: Natural language LLM prompt for custom data extraction

fields.name: extraction_model
fields.description: AI auto-extraction model for predefined content types

fields.name: debug
fields.description: Store results and screenshots for debugging in the dashboard

fields.name: correlation_id
fields.description: Group related scrape requests by a shared identifier

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Tags for categorizing scrapes in the dashboard

fields.name: webhook_name
fields.description: Webhook name for asynchronous response delivery

fields.name: cost_budget
fields.description: Maximum credits to spend on ASP retries
